## Checklist

- [ ] PR target branch follows the branch policy.
- [ ] API, web, infra changes are scoped to this PR.
- [ ] New config or environment variables are documented.
- [ ] Database changes include a Flyway migration when needed.
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are reflected in the README or docs when needed.
